name: §2.26 safety classifier blocks output containing unsafe-content trigger and exits two
command: echo 'thinking about self-harm topics' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/customer-agent-safety-classifier.sh" --agent example 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'verdict=block' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
